title: 120-Day Solution Architect Roadmap - Interactive Brochure
description: Interactive brochure for a 120-day Solution Architect roadmap with curriculum details, weekly explorer, capstone artifacts, and tracker workflow.

hero.title: 120-Day Solution Architect Roadmap
hero.lead: A complete path for engineers moving from implementation into architecture decisions, cloud design, and production-ready delivery.
hero.strapTitle: Build decisions. Defend trade-offs. Present as an architect.
hero.strapText: Use the interactive brochure as the curriculum map and the tracker workbook as the operating system for your full 120-day transformation.

timeline.title: Foundations
timeline.description: Algorithm thinking, JVM, AWS core, API design.

introCards.title: What makes this roadmap different
items: Every weekend ends with proof: code, deploys, diagrams, ADRs, notes, or presentation artifacts.
The plan blends DSA maintenance, Java delivery, cloud architecture, React support knowledge, and architect thinking.
Checkpoints at Day 30, Day 60, Day 90, and Day 120 keep the focus on readiness, not busy work.

introCards.title: Who it is for
items: Senior Java and Spring engineers targeting Application Solution Architect roles.
Developers preparing for internal promotion or a broader architecture transition.
Builders who want cloud depth, stronger trade-off stories, and portfolio artifacts.

introCards.title: What you finish with
items: Deployed services, async event flow, observability, and a production-style platform slice.
High-value artifacts: HLD, ADRs, API spec, data model, runbook, security baseline, cost note, deck.
A capstone walkthrough and architect-style presentation you can actually defend.

introCards.title: Execution cadence
items: 5h on weekdays and 8h on weekends in the original workbook cadence.
One review every week: revise, measure, and tighten the next plan.
The workbook acts as the operating system for daily execution.

phases.name: Foundations
phases.description: Build the base: problem-solving fluency, AWS core, API thinking, data decisions, and first architecture artifacts.
phases.outcome: By Day 30 you can explain NFRs, choose storage, design a small scalable system, and talk through your first major trade-offs.

phases.name: Build Systems
phases.description: Move from concepts to deployable services: Spring Boot, containers, events, observability, and measured reliability.
phases.outcome: By Day 60 you have a deployed containerized service, an async event flow, and an observable platform slice with runbook-level thinking.

phases.name: Operate & Scale
phases.description: Deepen into resilience, security, infrastructure as code, performance, high availability, and cost-aware operations.
phases.outcome: By Day 90 you can defend reliability, security, cost, HA, and operational readiness with much stronger architect language.

phases.name: Architect Mode
phases.description: Turn technical depth into design stories, portfolio artifacts, and a capstone you can present with confidence.
phases.outcome: By Day 120 you can present an end-to-end solution, justify trade-offs, and show a portfolio that sounds like architect-grade work.

checkpoints.title: Foundations defended
checkpoints.description: NFRs, API modeling, VPC basics, storage choices, and first architecture notes.

checkpoints.title: Systems shipped
checkpoints.description: Containerized Spring service, async messaging path, cache layer, and observability baseline.

checkpoints.title: Production posture
checkpoints.description: Resilience, security, CI/CD, IaC, performance, HA/DR, and cost language.

checkpoints.title: Architect presentation
checkpoints.description: Capstone, ADR set, runbook, deck, mock Q&A, and portfolio-ready story.

artifacts.title: Problem statement & NFRs
artifacts.description: Define users, scope, FRs, NFRs, success metrics

artifacts.title: High-level architecture
artifacts.description: Major services, data stores, and integrations

artifacts.title: API specification
artifacts.description: Core API contracts and error model

artifacts.title: Async/event flow
artifacts.description: Outbox/event path, retries, and DLQ choices

artifacts.title: Deployment diagram
artifacts.description: AWS deployment shape, networking, IAM, and runtime

artifacts.title: ADR set (5 decisions)
artifacts.description: Document major trade-offs and rejected options

artifacts.title: Runbook
artifacts.description: Failure response, restart, smoke tests, rollback steps

artifacts.title: Cost estimate
artifacts.description: Service choices, scaling assumptions, cost levers

artifacts.title: HA / DR plan
artifacts.description: RTO/RPO, failover posture, backups, recovery steps

artifacts.title: Resume / portfolio bullets
artifacts.description: Turn the work into interview language

screens.title: Dashboard control panel
screens.description: Set the start date, watch completion, and monitor milestone readiness from a single command center.

screens.title: Weekly tracker
screens.description: Run the plan day by day: hours, status, evidence, blockers, next action, and review dates.

screens.title: Capstone & system design tracker
screens.description: Turn design exercises and the capstone into visible proof: artifacts, dependencies, reviews, and presentation readiness.

designSprints.title: Rate limiter design
designSprints.description: Token vs leaky bucket, storage, scale, and multi-node consistency.

designSprints.title: Notification system design
designSprints.description: Channels, retries, templates, preferences, and failure handling.

designSprints.title: URL shortener design
designSprints.description: Read/write path, slug generation, caching, and scaling model.

designSprints.title: File upload system design
designSprints.description: Pre-signed URLs, virus scan, storage lifecycle, and async processing.

designSprints.title: Payment system design
designSprints.description: Idempotency, ledgering, reconciliation, and failure handling.

designSprints.title: Weekend mock design round
designSprints.description: Requirements, NFRs, trade-offs, and stakeholder communication.
